title: Assumption Register Entry
description: A single entry in the assumption register, documenting a project assumption, its owner, validation status, and impact if wrong.

description.description: Clear statement of the assumption being made

owner.description: Person or role responsible for validating this assumption

phase.description: Lifecycle phase in which this assumption must be validated

status.description: Current validation status of the assumption

due_date.description: Date by which this assumption must be validated (ISO 8601)

resolution.description: Description of how the assumption was validated or why it was invalidated

impact_if_wrong.description: Severity of impact on the project if this assumption proves incorrect

updated.description: Date the assumption entry was last updated (ISO 8601)

related_risk_id.description: Reference to a risk register entry if this assumption feeds a risk
